papers.title: A global analysis of Energy-Energy Correlation data: determination of $α_S$ and non-perturbative QCD parameters
papers.abstract: We present a comprehensive global analysis of Energy-Energy Correlation (EEC) data in electron-positron annihilation into hadrons, spanning a wide range of center-of-mass energies ($7.7\,\,\text{GeV}\!\leq\!\sqrt{s}\!\leq\! 91.2\,\,\text{GeV})$. In the back-to-back (two-jet) region, we resum to all orders the logarithmically-enhanced contributions up to next-to-next-to-next-to-leading logarithmic (N$^3$LL) accuracy. The resummed results are consistently matched to fixed-order calculations up to $\mathcal{O}(α_S^3)$. Our resummation formalism also incorporates dominant heavy-quark mass effects and models non-perturbative power corrections by means of an analytic dispersive approach. A simultaneous fit yields an excellent description of experimental data across all energies, enabling a precise determination of the strong coupling, $α_S(m_Z^2) = 0.119 \pm 0.002$, as well as the non-perturbative parameters, including those characterizing the Collins--Soper evolution kernel. Our analysis includes, for the first time in a global fit, datasets from the ALEPH and AMY collaborations.
papers.translated_abstract: 我们对正负电子湮灭成强子的能量-能量相关性 (EEC) 数据进行了全面的全局分析，涵盖了广泛的质心能量 ($7.7\,\,\text{GeV}\!\leq\!\sqrt{s}\!\leq\! 91.2\,\,\text{GeV})$。在背靠背（双喷头）区域，我们将所有阶次的对数增强贡献恢复到下一个到下一个到下一个领先的对数 (N$^3$LL) 精度。恢复的结果与高达 $\mathcal{O}(α_S^3)$ 的固定顺序计算一致匹配。我们的恢复形式主义还结合了占主导地位的重夸克质量效应，并通过分析色散方法对非微扰功率校正进行了建模。同时拟合可以很好地描述所有能量的实验数据，从而能够精确确定强耦合 $α_S(m_Z^2) = 0.119 \pm 0.002$ 以及非微扰参数，包括那些表征 Collins-Soper 演化内核的参数。我们的分析首次在全球范围内包含了 ALEPH 和 AMY 合作的数据集。

papers.title: Well-posedness for the Navier-Stokes equations in Morrey spaces on non-compact manifolds
papers.abstract: We analyze the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations on a class of non-compact Riemannian manifolds within the framework of Morrey spaces. Assuming bounded geometry together with negative Ricci and sectional curvature (e.g., hyperbolic spaces), we establish dispersive and smoothing estimates for the heat semigroups associated with the Beltrami, Bochner and Hodge Laplacians in Morrey spaces, as well as for the Riesz transform. In particular, the presence of negative curvature yields improved large-time decay compared to the Euclidean setting. These estimates are of independent interest and enable us to construct solutions in time-weighted spaces of Kato type, leading to local-in-time well-posedness on a broad class of non-compact manifolds and global one in the case of Einstein manifolds. In the latter setting, we assume a smallness condition on the initial data in Morrey norms, which are weaker than $L^{p}$-norms and thus allow for certain classes of large $L^{p}$-data. We also discuss extensions to Ricci-flat manifolds. Our results introduce a new class of non-decaying and rough initial data for the Navier-Stokes equations on manifolds, extending previous works in Lebesgue and Sobolev spaces.
papers.translated_abstract: 我们在 Morrey 空间框架内分析一类非紧黎曼流形上的不可压缩纳维-斯托克斯方程。假设有界几何以及负 Ricci 和截面曲率（例如双曲空间），我们为与 Morrey 空间中的 Beltrami、Bochner 和 Hodge Laplacian 相关的热半群以及 Riesz 变换建立色散和平滑估计。特别是，与欧几里得设置相比，负曲率的存在会改善大时间衰减。这些估计具有独立的意义，使我们能够在加藤类型的时间加权空间中构建解决方案，从而在一大类非紧流形上实现局部时间适定性，并在爱因斯坦流形的情况下实现全局适定性。在后一种设置中，我们假设 Morrey 范数中初始数据的小条件，该范数弱于 $L^{p}$-范数，因此允许某些类别的大 $L^{p}$-数据。我们还讨论了 Ricci 平坦流形的扩展。我们的结果为流形上的纳维-斯托克斯方程引入了一类新的非衰减且粗糙的初始数据，扩展了勒贝格和索博列夫空间中的先前工作。

papers.title: The smeared $R$-ratio in isoQCD from first-principles lattice simulations
papers.abstract: The $R$-ratio is a phenomenological observable of great relevance, both in itself and in applications such as the dispersive approach to the muon anomalous magnetic moment. It can be investigated from first-principles with controlled statistical and systematic errors in lattice QCD by introducing an arbitrary smearing kernel and employing spectral reconstruction techniques, such as the well-known Hansen-Lupo-Tantalo method. Improving upon a first study published in 2023, we show preliminary results using the correlation functions produced by ETMC in $N_f = 2+1+1$ lattice simulations at four lattice spacings, different volumes and with higher statistics w.r.t. our previous study. The new correlators, thanks to the implementation of the Low Mode Average technique, allow the determination of the $R$-ratio smeared with Gaussian kernels of widths down to $σ\sim 200$ with phenomenologically relevant precision.
papers.translated_abstract: $R$ 比率是一个具有重大相关性的现象学可观测值，无论是其本身还是在诸如μ子反常磁矩的色散方法等应用中。通过引入任意涂抹核并采用谱重建技术（例如众所周知的 Hansen-Lupo-Tantalo 方法），可以从晶格 QCD 中受控统计和系统误差的第一原理进行研究。基于 2023 年发表的第一项研究的改进，我们使用 ETMC 在 $N_f = 2+1+1$ 晶格模拟中使用 ETMC 生成的相关函数在四个晶格间距、不同体积和更高的统计量下展示了初步结果。我们之前的研究。由于低模平均技术的实施，新的相关器可以确定使用宽度低至 $σ\sim 200$ 的高斯核涂抹的 $R$ 比率，并具有现象学相关的精度。

papers.title: GWTC-4.0: Tests of General Relativity. II. Parameterized Tests
papers.abstract: In this second of three papers on tests of general relativity (GR) applied to the compact binary coalescence signals in the fourth Gravitational-Wave Transient Catalog (GWTC-4.0), we present the results of the parameterized tests of GR and constraints on line-of-sight acceleration. We include events up to and including the first part of the fourth observing run (O4a) of the LIGO Virgo KAGRA detectors. As in the other two papers in this series, we restrict our analysis to the 42 confident signals, measured by at least two detectors, that have false alarm rates $\le 10^{-3} \mathrm{yr}^{-1}$ from O4a, in addition to the 49 such events from previous observing runs. This paper focuses on the eight tests that constrain parameterized deviations from the expected GR (or unaccelerated) values. These include modifications of post-Newtonian (PN) parameters, spin-induced quadrupole moments different from those of a binary black hole, and possible dispersive or birefringent propagation effects. Overall, we find no evidence for physics beyond GR, for spin-induced quadrupole moments different from those of a Kerr black hole in GR, or for line of sight acceleration, with more than 90% of the events including the null result (no deviation) within their 90% credible intervals. We discuss possible systematics affecting the other events and tests, even though they are statistically not surprising, given noise. We improve the bounds on deviations from the GR PN coefficients by factors of 1.2-5.5 and provide illustrative translations to constraints on some modified theories. Also, we update the bound on the mass of the graviton, at 90% credibility, to $m_g \leq 1.92\times 10^{-23} \mathrm{eV}/c^2$. Thus, we see that GR holds, and many of the bounds on possible deviations derived from our events are the best to date.
papers.translated_abstract: 在第三篇关于广义相对论（GR）测试应用于第四个引力波瞬态目录（GWTC-4.0）中的紧凑二元合并信号的论文中，我们介绍了广义相对论（GR）参数化测试的结果和视线加速度的约束。我们包括 LIGO Virgo KAGRA 探测器第四次观测运行 (O4a) 的第一部分之前的事件。与本系列的其他两篇论文一样，我们将分析限制在由至少两个探测器测量的 42 个置信信号上，这些信号的误报率为 $\le 10^{-3} \mathrm{yr}^{-1}$ 来自 O4a，此外还有之前观测运行中的 49 个此类事件。本文重点讨论限制参数化与预期 GR（或未加速）值偏差的八项测试。这些包括后牛顿（PN）参数的修改、与双黑洞不同的自旋引起的四极矩，以及可能的色散或双折射传播效应。总体而言，我们没有发现任何证据证明超越广义相对论的物理学、与广义相对论中克尔黑洞不同的自旋引起的四极矩，或者视线加速，超过 90% 的事件在其 90% 可信区间内包括零结果（无偏差）。我们讨论了影响其他事件和测试的可能的系统性，尽管考虑到噪音，它们在统计上并不令人惊讶。我们将 GR PN 系数的偏差范围提高了 1.2-5.5 倍
authors: J. F. J. van den Brand

papers.title: Photoemission Signatures of Photoinduced Carriers and Excitons in One-Dimensional Mott Insulators
papers.abstract: We theoretically study photoemission spectra for photodoped one-dimensional Mott insulators that can host excitons, and show that their spectral characteristics differ qualitatively from those of photodoped semiconductors. In conventional semiconductors, photoemission spectra are well understood; free charge carriers generate spectral weight near the bottom of the conduction band, while the formation of excitons leads to replica features of the valence band appearing inside the band gap. In one-dimensional Mott insulators, on the other hand, strong correlations give rise to fractionalized elementary excitations-spinons, holons, and doublons-which fundamentally modify the photoemission response. We find that when photodoped carriers, i.e., doublons and holons, remain unbound, the photoemission spectrum directly reflects the dispersion of spinons, i.e., magnetic elementary excitations. In contrast, when a doublon and a holon form an excitonic bound state, replica structures of the lower Hubbard band emerge inside the Mott gap, carrying contributions from both spinon and holon excitations. Importantly, the distribution of the in-gap signal depends sensitively on the degree of doublon-holon binding. The origin of these spectral features is clarified through a combination of exact diagonalization and the slave-particle approach. These results indicate that photoemission from photoinduced carriers and excitons in strongly correlated electron systems can provide information on magnetic properties and carrier-binding properties.
papers.translated_abstract: 我们从理论上研究了可以容纳激子的光电掺杂一维莫特绝缘体的光电发射光谱，并表明它们的光谱特性与光电掺杂半导体的光谱特性有质的不同。在传统半导体中，光发射光谱是众所周知的。自由电荷载流子在导带底部附近产生光谱权重，而激子的形成导致带隙内出现价带的复制特征。另一方面，在一维莫特绝缘体中，强相关性会产生分段基本激发（自旋子、完整子和双子），这从根本上改变了光电发射响应。我们发现，当光掺杂载流子（即双布朗和完整子）保持未束缚状态时，光发射光谱直接反映了自旋子的色散，即磁基元激发。相反，当双子和完整子形成激子束缚态时，下哈伯德带的复制结构出现在莫特能隙内，携带来自自旋子和完整子激发的贡献。重要的是，间隙内信号的分布敏感地取决于双完整子结合的程度。通过精确对角化和从粒子方法的结合，阐明了这些光谱特征的起源。这些结果表明，强相关电子系统中光生载流子和激子的光发射可以提供有关磁的信息。

papers.title: On Affordable High-Order Entropy-Conservative/Stable and Well-Balanced Methods for Nonconservative Hyperbolic Systems
papers.abstract: Many entropy-conservative and entropy-stable (summarized as entropy-preserving) methods for hyperbolic conservation laws rely on Tadmor's theory for two-point entropy-preserving numerical fluxes and its higher-order extension via flux differencing using summation-by-parts (SBP) operators, e.g., in discontinuous Galerkin spectral element methods (DGSEMs). The underlying two-point formulations have been extended to nonconservative systems using fluctuations by Castro et al. (2013, doi:10.1137/110845379) with follow-up generalizations to SBP methods. We propose specific forms of entropy-preserving fluctuations for nonconservative hyperbolic systems that are simple to interpret and allow an algorithmic construction of entropy-preserving methods. We analyze necessary and sufficient conditions, and obtain a full characterization of entropy-preserving three-point methods within the finite volume framework. This formulation is extended to SBP methods in multiple space dimensions on Cartesian and curvilinear meshes. Additional properties such as well-balancedness extend naturally from the underlying finite volume method to the SBP framework. We use the algorithmic construction enabled by the chosen formulation to derive several new entropy-preserving schemes for nonconservative hyperbolic systems, e.g., the compressible Euler equations of an ideal gas using the internal energy equation and a dispersive shallow-water model. Numerical experiments show the robustness and accuracy of the proposed schemes.
papers.translated_abstract: 双曲守恒定律的许多熵守恒和熵稳定（概括为熵保持）方法依赖于 Tadmor 的两点熵保持数值通量理论及其通过使用分部求和 (SBP) 算子进行通量差分的高阶扩展，例如在不连续伽辽金谱元方法 (DGSEM) 中。 Castro 等人已将基础两点公式扩展到使用波动的非保守系统。 (2013, doi:10.1137/110845379) 以及对 SBP 方法的后续推广。我们为非保守双曲系统提出了特定形式的熵保持波动，这些形式易于解释并允许熵保持方法的算法构造。我们分析了必要和充分条件，并在有限体积框架内获得了保熵三点方法的完整表征。该公式扩展到笛卡尔和曲线网格上多个空间维度的 SBP 方法。其他属性（例如平衡性）自然地从底层有限体积方法延伸到 SBP 框架。我们使用所选公式所支持的算法构造来导出非保守双曲系统的几个新的熵保持方案，例如使用内能方程和色散浅水模型的理想气体的可压缩欧拉方程。数值实验表明了该方法的鲁棒性和准确性

papers.title: Navigating complex phase diagrams in soft matter systems
papers.abstract: Colloidal fluids can exhibit complex phase behavior and determining phase diagrams via experiments or computer simulations can be laborious. We demonstrate that the dispersion relation $ω(k)$, obtained from dynamical density functional theory for the uniform density system, is a highly versatile tool for {\it predicting} where in the phase diagram complex crystals form. The sign of $ω(k)$ determines whether density modes with wavenumber $k$ grow or decay over time. We demonstrate the predictive power by investigating the complex phase behavior of particles interacting via core-shoulder pair potentials. With complementary Monte Carlo simulations, we show that regions of the phase diagram where $ω(k)$ has one or several unstable (growing) wavenumbers are also where crystalline phases occur. Going further, by tuning these unstable wavenumbers via the interaction-potential and state-point parameters, we design systems with quasicrystals in the phase diagram. We identify a system with a certain shoulder-range exhibiting at least 10 different phases. Our general approach accelerates considerably the mapping of complex phase diagrams, crucial for the design of new materials.
papers.translated_abstract: 胶体流体可以表现出复杂的相行为，并且通过实验或计算机模拟确定相图可能很费力。我们证明，从均匀密度系统的动态密度泛函理论获得的色散关系 $ω(k)$ 是一种高度通用的工具，可用于{\it 预测}相图中复杂晶体的形成位置。 $ω(k)$ 的符号决定波数 $k$ 的密度模式是否随时间增长或衰减。我们通过研究通过核肩对势相互作用的粒子的复杂相行为来证明预测能力。通过互补的蒙特卡罗模拟，我们表明相图中 $ω(k)$ 具有一个或多个不稳定（增长）波数的区域也是发生结晶相的区域。更进一步，通过相互作用势和状态点参数调整这些不稳定的波数，我们设计了相图中具有准晶体的系统。我们识别出一个具有特定肩部范围的系统，该系统表现出至少 10 个不同的阶段。我们的通用方法大大加速了复杂相图的绘制，这对于新材料的设计至关重要。

papers.title: A Passive Elastic-Folding Mechanism for Stackable Airdrop Sensors
papers.abstract: Air-dispersed sensor networks deployed from aerial robotic systems (e.g., UAVs) provide a low-cost approach to wide-area environmental monitoring. However, existing methods often rely on active actuators for mid-air shape or trajectory control, increasing both power consumption and system cost. Here, we introduce a passive elastic-folding hinge mechanism that transforms sensors from a flat, stackable form into a three-dimensional structure upon release. Hinges are fabricated by laminating commercial sheet materials with rigid printed circuit boards (PCBs) and programming fold angles through a single oven-heating step, enabling scalable production without specialized equipment. Our geometric model links laminate geometry, hinge mechanics, and resulting fold angle, providing a predictive design methodology for target configurations. Laboratory tests confirmed fold angles between 10 degrees and 100 degrees, with a standard deviation of 4 degrees and high repeatability. Field trials further demonstrated reliable data collection and LoRa transmission during dispersion, while the Horizontal Wind Model (HWM)-based trajectory simulations indicated strong potential for wide-area sensing exceeding 10 km.
papers.translated_abstract: 从空中机器人系统（例如无人机）部署的空气分散传感器网络为广域环境监测提供了一种低成本方法。然而，现有方法通常依赖于主动执行器来进行空中形状或轨迹控制，从而增加了功耗和系统成本。在这里，我们引入了一种被动弹性折叠铰链机构，该机构在释放时将传感器从平坦的可堆叠形式转变为三维结构。铰链的制造方法是将商业片材与刚性印刷电路板 (PCB) 层压，并通过单个烤箱加热步骤对折叠角度进行编程，从而无需专用设备即可实现规模化生产。我们的几何模型将层压板几何形状、铰链力学和最终的折叠角度联系起来，为目标配置提供预测设计方法。实验室测试证实折叠角度在10度到100度之间，标准偏差为4度，重复性高。现场试验进一步证明了分散过程中可靠的数据收集和 LoRa 传输，而基于水平风模型 (HWM) 的轨迹模拟表明了超过 10 公里的广域传感的巨大潜力。

papers.title: Boltzmann-Bloch Equation Approach to the Theory of the Optical Inter- and Intraband Response in Noble Metals
papers.abstract: In this paper we introduce momentum-resolved metal Boltzmann-Bloch equations (MBBE) for the combined description of electronic intra- and interband processes in noble metals. This microscopic framework incorporates a full treatment of many-body electron-electron and electron-phonon interactions, relevant for relaxation and dephasing processes after optical excitation. For the example of gold, we calculate the linear optical response for near-infrared and visible energies. This provides insight into the interplay of microscopic processes hidden in phenomenological Drude-Lorentz models. The complex geometry of the Fermi surface is treated by an anisotropic electronic dispersion model, which is necessary to explain the temperature dependent spectrum over the whole frequency range of intra- and interband transitions.
papers.translated_abstract: 在本文中，我们引入动量分辨金属玻尔兹曼-布洛赫方程（MBBE）来组合描述贵金属中的电子带内和带间过程。这种微观框架结合了多体电子-电子和电子-声子相互作用的全面处理，与光激发后的弛豫和移相过程相关。以金为例，我们计算近红外和可见能量的线性光学响应。这提供了对现象学德鲁德-洛伦兹模型中隐藏的微观过程相互作用的洞察。费米表面的复杂几何形状通过各向异性电子色散模型进行处理，这对于解释带内和带间跃迁的整个频率范围内的温度相关频谱是必要的。

papers.title: Guided elastic waves informed material modelling of soft incompressible media
papers.abstract: Identifying a universal material constitutive law, that describes the mechanical response of rubber-like solids for all deformation fields and achievable extensions, is an outstanding challenge. Here, we propose to exploit the propagation of elastic waves and demonstrate that monitoring incremental guided wave propagation in an elastomer plate undergoing uniaxial extension reveals model sensitivities that are inaccessible in the corresponding static test. We measure the dispersion relations of the three zero-order guided modes, propagating parallel and perpendicular to the direction of imposed elongation. We compare them with predictions from the acoustoelastic theory, that also take into account material rheology, using parameters extracted from fitting the uniaxial stress-strain curve across three successive elongation regimes, following the methodical procedure of Destrade $\textit{et al.}$ (Proc. R. Soc. A 2017). We evidence that our approach lifts the degeneracy between hyperelastic models with different functional forms of the so-called $C_2$ term, which remain undistinguishable from static uniaxial tension stress-strain measurements alone. However, like their static counterpart, our dynamics measurements cannot distinguish between different generalized neo-Hookean models.
papers.translated_abstract: 确定一个通用材料本构定律，描述类橡胶固体对所有变形场和可实现的延伸的机械响应，是一项突出的挑战。在这里，我们建议利用弹性波的传播，并证明监测经历单轴延伸的弹性体板中的增量导波传播揭示了在相应的静态测试中无法获得的模型灵敏度。我们测量了平行和垂直于施加伸长方向传播的三个零阶导模的色散关系。我们将它们与声弹性理论的预测进行比较，声弹性理论也考虑了材料流变学，使用从拟合三个连续伸长范围的单轴应力-应变曲线中提取的参数，遵循 Destrade $\textit{et al.}$ (Proc. R. Soc. A 2017) 的系统程序。我们证明，我们的方法提高了具有不同功能形式的所谓 $C_2$ 项的超弹性模型之间的简并性，该模型与单独的静态单轴拉伸应力应变测量无法区分。然而，与静态模型一样，我们的动态测量无法区分不同的广义新胡克模型。

papers.title: Direct observation of strain and confinement shaping the hole subbands of Ge quantum wells
papers.abstract: Germanium-silicon-germanium (Ge/Si$_{x}$Ge$_{1-x}$) heterostructures have emerged as a promising platform for hole-spin quantum technologies and high-mobility electronics, where strain and quantum confinement strongly reshape the Ge valence bands. However, the momentum-resolved valence-band structure of buried strained Ge quantum wells has so far been inferred only indirectly. Here we use soft X-ray angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (SX-ARPES) to directly probe the electronic structure of strained Ge quantum wells embedded in SiGe barriers. We resolve strain-split and size-quantized valence subbands, determine their heavy-hole, light-hole and split-off composition, and measure the valence-band offset at the Ge/SiGe heterojunction. Comparison with ab initio calculations shows that an accurate description requires explicit inclusion of the confinement potential imposed by the SiGe barrier, which plays a decisive role in determining the dispersion, ordering and mixing of the hole states. Our results provide the first direct experimental picture of how strain and confinement determine the valence-band structure of Ge quantum wells, establishing a foundation for predictive modelling of hole-spin qubits and high-mobility devices based on group-IV heterostructures.
papers.translated_abstract: 锗-硅-锗 (Ge/Si$_{x}$Ge$_{1-x}$) 异质结构已成为空穴自旋量子技术和高迁移率电子学的有前景的平台，其中应变和量子限制强烈重塑 Ge 价带。然而，迄今为止，埋藏应变Ge量子阱的动量分辨价带结构仅是间接推断的。在这里，我们使用软 X 射线角分辨光电子能谱 (SX-ARPES) 直接探测嵌入 SiGe 势垒中的应变 Ge 量子阱的电子结构。我们解析了应变分裂和尺寸量子化的价子带，确定了它们的重空穴、轻空穴和分裂成分，并测量了 Ge/SiGe 异质结处的价带偏移。与从头计算的比较表明，准确的描述需要明确包含SiGe势垒施加的限制势，这在确定空穴态的分散、有序和混合方面起着决定性作用。我们的结果提供了第一个关于应变和限制如何决定Ge量子阱的价带结构的直接实验图，为空穴自旋量子位和基于IV族异质结构的高迁移率器件的预测建模奠定了基础。

papers.title: Radiation damping of the soliton internal mode in 1D quadratic Klein-Gordon equation
papers.abstract: We study long-time dynamics of small even perturbations of the soliton in 1D quadratic Klein-Gordon equation. The soliton possesses both an internal mode and the unstable mode. On a codimension-one manifold of fine-tuned initial data the instability is suppressed and the internal mode decays slowly by transferring energy into the continuum. We show that this decay and the associated nonlinear frequency shift are accurately captured by a cubic resonant approximation, with the damping rate determined by a Fermi golde rule-type coefficient. This provides a quantitative description of irreversible energy transfer from the internal mode to dispersive radiation.
papers.translated_abstract: 我们研究一维二次 Klein-Gordon 方程中孤子的小均匀扰动的长期动力学。孤子同时具有内模和不稳定模。在微调初始数据的余维一流形上，通过将能量转移到连续体中，不稳定性被抑制，内部模式缓慢衰减。我们表明，这种衰减和相关的非线性频移可以通过三次共振近似精确捕获，阻尼率由费米戈尔德规则类型系数确定。这提供了从内模到色散辐射的不可逆能量转移的定量描述。

papers.title: Remedying Target-Domain Astigmatism for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection
papers.abstract: Cross-domain few-shot object detection (CD-FSOD) aims to adapt pretrained detectors from a source domain to target domains with limited annotations, suffering from severe domain shifts and data scarcity problems. In this work, we find a previously overlooked phenomenon: models exhibit dispersed and unfocused attention in target domains, leading to imprecise localization and redundant predictions, just like a human cannot focus on visual objects. Therefore, we call it the target-domain Astigmatism problem. Analysis on attention distances across transformer layers reveals that regular fine-tuning inherently shows a trend to remedy this problem, but results are still far from satisfactory, which we aim to enhance in this paper. Biologically inspired by the human fovea-style visual system, we enhance the fine-tuning's inherent trend through a center-periphery attention refinement framework, which contains (1) a Positive Pattern Refinement module to reshape attention toward semantic objects using class-specific prototypes, simulating the visual center region; (2) a Negative Context Modulation module to enhance boundary discrimination by modeling background context, simulating the visual periphery region; and (3) a Textual Semantic Alignment module to strengthen center-periphery distinction through cross-modal cues. Our bio-inspired approach transforms astigmatic attention into focused patterns, substantially improving adaptation to target domains. Experiments on six challenging CD-FSOD benchmarks consistently demonstrate improved detection accuracy and establish new state-of-the-art results.
papers.translated_abstract: 跨域少样本目标检测（CD-FSOD）旨在将预训练的检测器从源域调整到注释有限的目标域，面临严重的域转移和数据稀缺问题。在这项工作中，我们发现了一个以前被忽视的现象：模型在目标领域表现出分散且不集中的注意力，导致定位不精确和冗余预测，就像人类无法专注于视觉对象一样。因此，我们将其称为目标域像散问题。对跨 Transformer 层的注意力距离的分析表明，定期微调本质上显示出解决此问题的趋势，但结果仍远未令人满意，这是我们在本文中旨在增强的目标。受人类中央凹式视觉系统的生物学启发，我们通过中心-外围注意力细化框架来增强微调的固有趋势，其中包含（1）一个积极模式细化模块，使用特定于类的原型重塑对语义对象的注意力，模拟视觉中心区域； （2）负上下文调制模块，通过建模背景上下文、模拟视觉外围区域来增强边界辨别力； (3) 文本语义对齐模块，通过跨模式线索加强中心与外围的区分。我们的仿生方法将散光注意力转变为聚焦模式，从而大大提高对目标领域的适应能力。六张具有挑战性的 CD 上的实验

papers.title: Observation of Resonance of Kagome Flat Band Doublet
papers.abstract: The interplay between local and itinerant electrons underpins many correlated and topological quantum states. Kagome lattices provide an ideal platform by hosting both flat (localized states) and dispersive bands (itinerant states), yet direct spectroscopic evidence of their dynamical coupling has remained elusive. Here we report the long-sought flat band resonance in the quasi-two-dimensional kagome bilayer material CsCr6Sb6. Using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy, transport measurements, and combined density functional theory and dynamical mean-field theory, we identify coexisting flat band doublets and dispersive bands near the Fermi energy. Upon cooling, the flat and dispersive bands exhibit a pronounced enhancement of spectral weight and hybridization, directly evidencing flat band resonance. Crucially, this emergence coincides with the onset of short-range antiferromagnetic correlations, contrasting sharply with conventional Kondo lattice behavior. Our findings demonstrate not only the long-sought flat band resonance in kagome materials, but also its unconventional correlation with magnetism.
papers.translated_abstract: 局域电子和流动电子之间的相互作用支撑着许多相关和拓扑量子态。 Kagome 晶格通过承载平坦（局域态）和色散带（流动态）提供了一个理想的平台，但其动态耦合的直接光谱证据仍然难以捉摸。在这里，我们报告了准二维 kagome 双层材料 CsCr6Sb6 中长期寻求的平带共振。利用角分辨光电子能谱、输运测量以及组合密度泛函理论和动态平均场理论，我们识别了费米能量附近共存的平带双峰和色散带。冷却后，平带和色散带表现出光谱权重和杂化的显着增强，直接证明了平带共振。至关重要的是，这种出现与短程反铁磁相关性的开始同时发生，与传统的近藤晶格行为形成鲜明对比。我们的研究结果不仅证明了戈薇材料中长期寻求的平带共振，而且还证明了它与磁性的非传统相关性。

papers.title: UGC 2369S: a Kpc Scale Triple Merger Candidate Identified in a Nearby Luminous Infrared Galaxy
papers.abstract: We present high spatial resolution ($\lesssim$1.0''), multi-wavelength observations of UGC 2369S, a nearby luminous infrared galaxy showing three distinct cores separated on kpc scales in near-infrared (NIR) imaging with significant X-ray emission. Utilizing optical/NIR adaptive optics (AO), radio, \chandra X-ray, as well as archival HST imaging, we perform a comprehensive study of AGN activity, obscuration, and host properties. As one of the clearest cases of a triple-nucleus merger at $\simeq$3 kpc separations, UGC 2369S is the first to be studied with high-resolution observations at multiple wavelength. We find that the northern core, having possibly the most massive black hole in the system ($\rm M_{BH}\simeq10^{8}\,M_{\odot}$) is consistent with a heavily obscured AGN. However, its high dust extinction ($\rm A_v>5$), hydrogen column density ($N_\mathrm{H}\gtrsim 10^{25}\,\rm cm^{-2}$) and non-detection of optical coronal lines and coronal X-ray emission leave the identification inconclusive. The other two cores show no evidence for black-hole activity and instead exhibit signatures of tidal disruption. From stellar mass surface density and stellar velocity dispersion maps, we infer that the strongly varying gravitational potential in this three-body system may have cannibalized the stellar bulge of the southwestern core, leaving a metal enriched remnant. An ongoing survey focusing on similar triple systems could help us understand how they evolve and help benchmark numerical simulations, providing insight into gravitational wave predictions and the formation of the most massive black holes.
papers.translated_abstract: 我们展示了对 UGC 2369S 的高空间分辨率 ($\lesssim$1.0'') 多波长观测，UGC 2369S 是一个附近的发光红外星系，在近红外 (NIR) 成像中显示出在 kpc 尺度上分离的三个不同的核心，并具有显着的 X 射线发射。利用光学/近红外自适应光学 (AO)、无线电、钱德拉 X 射线以及档案 HST 成像，我们对 AGN 活动、遮蔽和宿主特性进行了全面研究。作为 $\simeq$3 kpc 分离的三核合并最清晰的案例之一，UGC 2369S 是第一个在多个波长下进行高分辨率观测研究的案例。我们发现北部核心可能拥有系统中最大质量的黑洞 ($\rm M_{BH}\simeq10^{8}\,M_{\odot}$) 与严重遮挡的活动星系核一致。然而，其高尘埃消光度（$\rm A_v>5$）、氢柱密度（$N_\mathrm{H}\gtrsim 10^{25}\,\rm cm^{-2}$）以及未检测到光学日冕线和日冕X射线发射，使得识别结果尚无定论。另外两个核心没有显示出黑洞活动的证据，而是显示出潮汐破坏的特征。根据恒星质量表面密度和恒星速度色散图，我们推断这个三体系统中剧烈变化的引力势可能蚕食了西南核心的恒星核球，留下富含金属的残余物。一项正在进行的针对类似三重系统的调查可以帮助我们了解它们是如何演变的，并帮助对数字进行基准测试
